name: Banana Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream sugar and butter until well blended.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time.
4. Stir in vanilla, lemon juice, and mashed banana.
5. Add rolled oats and nuts alternately with the banana mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
6. Spread dough in a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 15 to 18 minutes, or until golden brown.
